title: Perbualan Ringkas di Parti
opening: Hai, apa khabar? Seronok pula dapat berjumpa awak di sini malam ni! Bagaimana awak rasa parti ini setakat ini?

t1.prompt: Hai, apa khabar? Seronok pula dapat berjumpa awak di sini malam ni! Bagaimana awak rasa parti ini setakat ini?
t1.promptTranslation: Hai, apa khabar? (Hai, apa khabar?) — Hi, how are you? It's nice to see you here tonight! What do you think of the party so far?

t2.prompt: Oh, faham. Saya pun rasa suasana malam ni agak meriah. Omong-omong, apa yang awak buat hujung minggu ni? Ada rancangan menarik?
t2.promptTranslation: Oh, faham. (Oh, faham.) — Oh, I understand. I also think the atmosphere tonight is quite lively. By the way, what did you do this weekend? Any interesting plans?

t3_leisure.prompt: Bunyi macam syok je tu! Saya memang suka dengar orang ada masa untuk diri sendiri atau buat aktiviti yang menyeronokkan. Ada apa-apa filem, buku, atau tempat baru yang awak cadangkan?
t3_leisure.promptTranslation: Bunyi macam syok je tu! (Bunyi macam syok je tu!) — Sounds like fun! I really like hearing about people having time for themselves or doing enjoyable activities. Any movies, books, or new places you'd recommend?

t3_workstudy.prompt: Oh, faham. Kadang-kadang kerja atau belajar memang tak boleh elak. Harap-harap tak terlalu memenatkan. Apa yang awak buat untuk pastikan awak tak burnout atau untuk 'reward' diri?
t3_workstudy.promptTranslation: Oh, faham. (Oh, faham.) — Oh, I understand. Sometimes work or study really can't be avoided. Hopefully, it wasn't too tiring. What do you do to make sure you don't burn out or to 'reward' yourself?

t4_closure.prompt: Menarik sekali perbualan kita malam ni! Masa pun dah banyak berlalu, saya nak pergi ambil minuman sekejap. Harap kita dapat berborak lagi di lain masa, ya?
t4_closure.promptTranslation: Menarik sekali perbualan kita malam ni! (Menarik sekali perbualan kita malam ni!) — Our conversation tonight has been really interesting! Time has passed quickly, I'm going to grab a drink. Hope we can chat again sometime, okay?

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, saya tak berapa faham. Boleh ulang semula atau cuba guna perkataan lain?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Maaf, saya tak berapa faham. Boleh ulang semula atau cuba guna perkataan lain? — Sorry, I don't quite understand. Can you repeat or try using different words?

t-end.prompt: Baiklah, jumpa lagi! Selamat menikmati parti ni!
t-end.promptTranslation: Baiklah, jumpa lagi! Selamat menikmati parti ni! — All right, see you again! Enjoy the party!
